'''fathowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabag|seabag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabag|seabag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fathowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætheweth|fætheweth]] || [[word:fæthewej|fæthewej]] || [[word:fæthewesh|fæthewesh]] || [[word:fæthewe|fæthewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathothowoth|fathothowoth]] || [[word:fathothowoj|fathothowoj]] || [[word:fathothowosh|fathothowosh]] || [[word:fathothowo|fathothowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathowoth|fathowoth]] || [[word:fathowoj|fathowoj]] || [[word:fathowosh|fathowosh]] || [[word:fathowo|fathowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathofwoth|fathofwoth]] || [[word:fathofwoj|fathofwoj]] || [[word:fathofwosh|fathofwosh]] || [[word:fathofwof|fathofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathowotho|fathowotho]] || [[word:fathowojo|fathowojo]] || [[word:fathowosho|fathowosho]] || [[word:fathowoko|fathowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathowoth|fathowoth]] || [[word:fathowoj|fathowoj]] || [[word:fathowosh|fathowosh]] || [[word:fathowo|fathowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathowothol|fathowothol]] || [[word:fathowojol|fathowojol]] || [[word:fathowoshol|fathowoshol]] || [[word:fathowokol|fathowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathowothotho|fathowothotho]] || [[word:fathowojojo|fathowojojo]] || [[word:fathowoshosho|fathowoshosho]] || [[word:fathowoko|fathowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathowothon|fathowothon]] || [[word:fathowojon|fathowojon]] || [[word:fathowoshon|fathowoshon]] || [[word:fathowokon|fathowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathowothoro|fathowothoro]] || [[word:fathowojoro|fathowojoro]] || [[word:fathowoshoro|fathowoshoro]] || [[word:fathowokoro|fathowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
